TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Craig Brackins unu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, u p'agal tins' tabakiay ayaway mimaliay. Craig Brackins i 2010 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 21, namapili' tu nu Oklahoma City Thunder putiput. 10 bulad 9 demiad, 1987 a mihca, Craig Brackins miunduay.
S.PHON: ¶raig bra ¶kins unu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, u p î~ °agar~…æ tins î~ ° tabakiaj ajawaj mimar~…æiaj. ¶raig bra ¶kins i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu okr~…æaƒßoma ¶itj tƒßund…ôr putiput. ** bur~…æad * d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, ¶raig bra ¶kins miunduaj.
S.FORM: Craig Brackins unu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, u p'agal tins' tabakiay ayaway mimaliay. Craig Brackins i 2010 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 21, namapili' tu nu Oklahoma City Thunder putiput. 10 bulad 9 demiad, 1987 a mihca, Craig Brackins miunduay.
S.PHON: ¶raig bra ¶kins unu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, u p î~ °agar~…æ tins î~ ° tabakiaj ajawaj mimar~…æiaj. ¶raig bra ¶kins i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu okr~…æaƒßoma ¶itj tƒßund…ôr putiput. ** bur~…æad * d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, ¶raig bra ¶kins miunduaj.
